message:
fix(core): resize_scheduler variable shadow rename + input guardrail integration test

resize_scheduler.rs (+8/-8):
- Rename local variable \`state\` → \`pane_state\` in
  \`record_lifecycle_event()\` to avoid shadowing the \`state\` method
  parameter and improve readability at the three downstream usage
  sites (\`latest_seq\`, \`pending_seq\`, \`active_seq\` lookups)

resize_scheduler_input_guardrail_integration.rs (107 LOC, NEW):
- Integration test exercising resize scheduler input validation:
  zero-dimension reject, overlapping intent dedup, and stall
  detection threshold behavior under rapid-fire intent submission

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
